title: An Ordinance Approving the Use of a Portion of Road at Villegas Street, Brgy. Baybayin and a Portion of Road at Palis Street, Brgy. Timugan for Putting Up of Cederas for the Upcoming Celebration of the Feast of Immaculate Concepcion and Year-end Seasons for the Period December 1, 2022 to January 15, 2023 and the Collection of Fees of the Cederas. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR JONATHAN BRYAN S. SIYTIAP, 11/28/2022)
